name: ExtensionRequestOrchestration_Action_Goal
title: R5: What goals (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `RequestOrchestration.action.goal` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`RequestOrchestration.action.goal` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Goal)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `RequestOrchestration.action.goal` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Goal)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `RequestOrchestration.action.goal` has a context of RequestGroup.action based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `RequestGroup`.
Element `RequestOrchestration.action.goal` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Goals that are intended to be achieved by following the requests in this action.
